## Summary

Describe the change in 1–3 sentences.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / tech debt
- [ ] Docs only

## How to test

Explain how a reviewer can verify this change locally:

1. `bun install`
2. `bun run dev`
3. ...

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `bun install` and the app starts without errors
- [ ] I ran `bun run typecheck` (or `bun x tsc --noEmit`) locally
- [ ] I ran `bun test` (or added/updated tests where it made sense)
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed (`README`, `docs/`, `CHANGELOG`)
- [ ] I confirmed there are no secrets (API keys, stream keys) in this PR

## Screenshots / recordings (if UI changes)

Add before/after screenshots or screen recordings when changing the webview UI.
